task:
Inspect the local NixOS repo and runtime relevant to Quickshell top-bar animation pacing. Focus on home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml, quickshell.nix, service environment, monitor setup, Qt/Quickshell versions, and current experimental Cmd+I path. Identify concrete local causes and safe experiments. Also inspect installed process environment and renderer/render-loop evidence where possible. Do not edit files. Return file/line and command evidence.

---
**Output:**
Write your findings to exactly this path: /home/ian/.config/nixos/.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/1add01a4-bb1b-4fbe-8a76-cbd5f5648b56/local-quickshell-frame-pacing.md
This path is authoritative for this run.
Ignore any other output filename or output path mentioned elsewhere, including output destinations in the base agent prompt, system prompt, or task instructions.

## Acceptance Contract
Acceptance level: attested
Completion is not accepted from prose alone. End with a structured acceptance report.

Criteria:
- criterion-1: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

Required evidence: review-findings, residual-risks

Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:
Use empty arrays when no items apply; array fields contain strings unless object entries are shown.
`criteriaSatisfied[].status` must be exactly one of: satisfied, not-satisfied, not-applicable.
`commandsRun[].result` must be exactly one of: passed, failed, not-run.
`manualNotes` and `notes` are optional strings; an empty string means no note and does not satisfy `manual-notes` evidence.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Severity-ranked findings cite Bar.qml, quickshell.nix, hyprland.nix, StatusData.qml, shell.qml, plus runtime process/service/monitor/version evidence.

commandsRun.command: pgrep/readlink/proc environ; qs --version; quickshell --version; qmake6 -query QT_VERSION; hyprctl monitors -j
commandsRun.summary: Identified Quickshell 0.3.0, Qt 6.11.1 paths, process environment, and 120/165 Hz outputs; qmake6 subcommand was unavailable.
Confirmed production service, resource history, startup logs, and no explicit renderer selection in journal.

commandsRun.command: grep process maps and Quickshell .qslog for Qt/render/RHI terms; nvidia-smi; hyprctl version
commandsRun.summary: Confirmed Qt 6.11.1 linkage, render-loop-driven incubation evidence, NVIDIA runtime availability, and Hyprland 0.55.4.

validationOutput: No repository files edited; report written only to the required artifact path.
Runtime monitor configuration matches repository: DP-2 120 Hz and eDP-1 165 Hz.
residualRisks: No frame-time trace; perceived easing and genuine missed frames are not yet separated.
Exact Qt renderer/backend and render-loop type remain unidentified.
Historical ~1 GiB memory peaks are unexplained.

medium: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:60-74 and shell.qml:8-13 - full-width 600-logical-pixel layer surfaces exist on both monitors.

low: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:328-353 - aggressive Bezier can itself look uneven.
